channel.title: Technology on Slav Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Technology on Slav Blog

item.title: From Overwhelm to Progress: My New Approach
item.description:
From Overwhelm to Progress: My New Approach

Hey there, and welcome to my blog.

If you’re a developer, you’ll probably relate to this: I want to learn everything. Not just one thing - everything at once. I’ll start researching a new JavaScript framework, then discover it pairs well with a certain state management library, which leads me to reading about database optimization, which reminds me I should learn Docker better, and oh wait - what about that new Clawdbot AI assistant everyone’s talking about?
